use clap::Parser;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long)]
    json: bool,

    #[arg(long)]
    text: bool,

    #[arg(long)]
    include: Vec<String>,

    #[arg(long)]
    exclude: Vec<String>,
}

fn run(cli: Cli) {
    if cli.json && cli.text {
        eprintln!("warning: both --json and --text specified, using --json");
    }
    let filters: Vec<&str> = cli.include.iter().chain(cli.exclude.iter()).map(|s| s.as_str()).collect();
    println!("filters: {filters:?}");
}
